instruction: Change the return type from a single best-subarray tuple to a list of ALL subarrays whose sum equals the global maximum sum. Return them as a list of (start, end, total) tuples sorted by start index in ascending order. If only one subarray achieves the maximum sum, return a list with one element. If the input is empty, return an empty list. If all values are negative, the maximum is the single largest element; only single-element subarrays at that value are included.
